message:
Checkpoint: File edits

Automatic checkpoint created by Claude Code
- Branch: main
- Timestamp: 2026-01-17T20:45:49Z
- Changes: 1 file(s)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,21 +1,19 @@
-# PostgreSQL with pgvector Testing Environment
-# pgvector provides core vector operations compatible with RuVector
+# RuVector PostgreSQL Testing Environment
+# Official RuVector extension from ruvnet/ruvector-postgres
 #
 # Features:
-# - Vector similarity search (HNSW/IVFFlat)
-# - Cosine, L2, Inner Product distances
-# - Efficient approximate nearest neighbor search
-# - JSON metadata support
+# - 230+ SQL functions for vector operations
+# - HNSW/IVFFlat indexing with SIMD acceleration
+# - Flash Attention, GNN operations
+# - Hybrid search (dense + sparse)
+# - Multi-tenancy support
+# - Self-healing capabilities
 #
-# Note: Using pgvector/pgvector:pg17 as ruvnet/ruvector-postgres has
-# extension installation issues. RuVector functions can be added via
-# custom SQL when the image is fixed.
-#
-# Performance: ~1ms latency, 10,000+ QPS with HNSW
+# Performance: ~61µs latency, 16,400 QPS with HNSW
 
 services:
   postgres:
-    image: pgvector/pgvector:pg17
+    image: ruvnet/ruvector-postgres:latest
     container_name: ruvector-postgres
     environment:
       POSTGRES_USER: claude
@@ -25,16 +23,14 @@ services:
       - "5432:5432"
     volumes:
       - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
-      - ./scripts/init-db.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/01-init.sql
+      - ./scripts/init-db.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/02-claude-flow.sql
     healthcheck:
       test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U claude -d claude_flow"]
       interval: 5s
       timeout: 5s
-      retries: 5
-    # Optimize for vector operations
+      retries: 10
     command: >
       postgres
-      -c shared_preload_libraries='vector'
       -c work_mem=256MB
       -c maintenance_work_mem=512MB
